news.t: Tema ETFs Exceeds $5bn in AUM After Three Years
Tema ETFs Surpasses $2 Billion in AUM in Under Three Years
Tema Appoints ETF Industry Leader Steve Munroe as President
Tema's Oncology ETF (CANC) Surpasses $100m in Assets Amidst Strong 2025 Performance
Tema Surpasses $1bn AUM Two Years After Launch, Strengthens Team With Key Growth Hires
Tema Launches Two Innovative, Active ETF Thematic Strategies: Oncology & Global Royalties

holdings.infoBox: CANC is an equity ETF with a total of 60 individual holdings. The top holdings are Revolution Medicines stock at 6.38%, Eli Lilly and Company at 5.27%, Novartis AG at 4.40%, Legend Biotech at 4.38%, and Cogent Biosciences at 4.27%.

overview.description: The Tema Oncology ETF (CANC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in stocks of companies focused on cancer treatment and management from issuers all around the world. The fund uses a bottom-up approach to select pioneering companies at perceived attractive valuations CANC was launched on Aug 15, 2023 and is issued by Tema.
